name: 宙斯x27电击枪 | 鼾龙传说
nameZh: 宙斯x27电击枪 | 鼾龙传说
descriptionEn: Perfect for close-range ambushes and enclosed area encounters, the rechargeable x27 Zeus is capable of incapacitating an enemy in a single hit. A dragon wraps around this lighthearted, custom painted x27. From the highest room of the tallest tower
descriptionZh: 非常适合用在近距离伏击和狭路相逢的情况下，可充电的宙斯x27电击枪能将敌人一击致命。 一条鼾龙环绕在这把轻松风格的x27上。 来自最高塔楼的顶层房间
